texto: I don't have a creepy uncle, but I certainly have many, many uncles. My mom has twelve brothers and sisters, and my dad has two sisters and three brothers. Their maturity level is still hovering around fifteen when they all get together, but they're not necessarily creepy.
explicacao: Citação de Martha MacIsaac sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't have a creepy uncle, but I certainly have many, many uncles. My mom has twelve brothers a…” articula reflexao, together, maturity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como maturity.
